name: lumadock-learning-lab
description: Independent React + TypeScript + FastAPI frontend learning product lab.

scripts.backend:dev: conda run -n frontend-product-lab uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
scripts.verify: npm.cmd --prefix frontend run lint && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run format:check && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run test && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run build && conda run -n frontend-product-lab pytest backend
